aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Yes — Aries doesn't need the cosmos to give the green light. The pipeline is green. That's enough.
aries.prophecy: The stars have nothing to say today. Aries will deploy anyway. The stars will have plenty to say after that.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Taurus made this decision last week. Nothing you say today changes it.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today. The ticket opened in Q1 remains untouched. It will remain untouched. No one knows who owns it.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Gemini opened the deploy checklist and three other tabs. One is a rewrite in a new framework. We'll revisit in two hours.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. Gemini has opinions about this. A Slack thread has been started. It will not end today.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Cancer checked the error rate graph. Then checked it again. The vibe is off. They can't explain it. Trust the vibe.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. Cancer has been quietly watching the metrics for 40 minutes. Everything is fine. Probably. Cancer is not convinced.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo has written release notes for a two-line fix. They are beautifully formatted. There are screenshots.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today. Leo's camera is on in every meeting. Leo brought slides. Leo is the only one who brought slides.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Virgo found a linting warning from 2019. It must be addressed. All of them must be addressed. Deploy next quarter.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say nothing unusual today. Virgo found something unusual. Virgo always finds something. There is now a meeting at 4.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — Libra reviewed the deploy arguments and the no-deploy arguments. The pros and cons doc is now 4 pages. Revisiting Friday.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos have nothing to report. Libra has written three paragraphs about the implications of that in the team doc. The discussion is ongoing.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — Scorpio has been preparing for this deploy since last Tuesday. The rollback plan is documented. Scorpio trusts no one else to execute it.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. Scorpio does not believe that. Scorpio is reading the logs. Scorpio will find what the logs are hiding.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius already pushed. Sagittarius is watching the pipeline. Sagittarius is also eating lunch. This is fine.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars recommend caution today. Sagittarius has already merged without waiting for review. The tests passed. This time.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn blocked the calendar, wrote the runbook, tested in staging, and reviewed the diff. Deploy at 2pm. Not 2:01.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today. Capricorn is on their fifth Jira ticket. It is 9:17am. The queue will not outlast Capricorn.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Aquarius is writing a GitHub Action to automate the deploy decision. It involves an LLM. The irony is undetected.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Aquarius has opened an RFC about what to do about the quiet. Comment period closes in two weeks.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Pisces had a feeling. Can't explain it. The vibe wasn't right. Pisces will know when it's time. It is not time.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. Pisces has been thinking about a refactor since March. It remains a thought. It is a beautiful thought.
